item.text: Final verification batch is now down to the suite run. I’m running the project’s existing `npm test` suite as requested, then I’ll add a short reproducibility script for the default-tool regression, run it, and delete it before reporting the result.
Running the full verification suite and closing out T8 now. First step is to collect the `npm test` result from the in-flight session, then fix and rerun only if the full suite reports regressions.

The full suite is surfacing a broad set of failures well outside this feature slice, so I’m separating likely pre-existing repo breakage from anything touched by the default-tool work. Next I’m checking whether the run has finished, then I’ll isolate whether any failures are attributable to the files changed in this batch.

The full suite is still running; the important signal so far is that the failures are scattered across many unrelated domains rather than clustering around the sidebar/default-tool files. I’m waiting for the final vitest summary, then I’ll decide whether any patch is actually needed for this feature branch or whether T8 closes as verified-with-preexisting-suite-failures.

The suite is close to completion. Once Vitest emits the final totals, I’ll capture the failing modules, run the temporary reproduction script required for the final verification task, and then write the batch checkpoint JSON.
